name: Potential Windows Exploit via MSDT
notes:
This rule triggers when a potential Microsoft Support Diagnostic Tool (MSDT) vulnerability exploitation is detected. 

Microsoft issued "CVE-2022-30190" for vulnerability on MSDT. The adversary may perform remote code execution using MSDT to run arbitrary code.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Command (custom) is not N/A
when the event matches LOWER("Process Name") MATCHES '(msdt.exe)' AQL filter query
when the event matches LOWER("Command") MATCHES '(.*it_browseforfile.*|.*it_launchmethod.*)' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Potential Windows Exploit via MSDT on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Command (custom) is not N/A
AND when the event matches LOWER("Process Name") MATCHES '(msdt.exe)' AQL filter query
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") MATCHES '(.*it_browseforfile.*|.*it_launchmethod.*)' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Potential Windows Exploit via MSDT
Event description: Detects when a potential Microsoft Support Diagnostic Tool (MSDT) vulnerability exploitation is detected.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
